details.test: Task 1: Add 2 units of cheapest gluten-free immune-support supplement under $20 with rating >= 4.5
Task 2: 1-day vegan meal from 3 recipes under 500 calories (2 servings each)
Task 3: Buy highest-rated Vitamin D3 2000 IU under $20 with >= 100 reviews
Task 4: Add a no-added-sugar supplement under $40 (protein filter applied)
Task 5: Add selected ingredients for a vegan recipe keeping added cost under $25
Task 6: Reach free-shipping threshold using supplements with total between threshold and threshold+5
Task 7: Choose an immune-support product with >= 15% savings vs list price
Task 8: Guest checkout up to payment step for immune-support cart
Task 9: Select a supplement between $10 and $25 with rating >= 4 stars
